Label1.name: Label1
Label1.label: To display the latest user data in EPC, click on the Update Grid/Dropdown button. Note that you will still need to select the Add/Update button to synchronize the users in DBP.

Label4.name: Label4
Label4.label: If you sync the users first and then the roles, the relationship between the two in EPC will be kept on the DBP side. If you sync the roles first, however, and then the users, the relationship between the two in EPC will not be kept on the DBP side.

Label.name: Label
Label.label: Synchronize All Departments, Roles, Users, & Their Relations
Label.tooltip: You will get notifications during process and the message with the result at the end.

children.caption: Synchronize All Departments, Roles, Users, & Their Relations

If you sync the users first and then the roles, the relationship between the two in EPC will be kept on the DBP side. If you sync the roles first, however, and then the users, the relationship between the two in EPC will not be kept on the DBP side.
To display the latest user data in EPC, click on the Update Grid/Dropdown button. Note that you will still need to select the Add/Update button to synchronize the users in DBP.
